Describe the sequence of different activities shown involving the main subject or group throughout the video.
canonical_answer: At 4s, a person in a teal shirt sits at a desk with a laptop; at 8s, a man in a varsity jacket stands near a projector screen; at 12s, a man in a grey hoodie stirs a pot on a stove; at 14s, a group of men pose for a selfie on a soccer field.

question: Describe the sequence of social media platforms and profiles shown in the final segments.
canonical_answer: At 14s, a YouTube channel interface grid appears on screen; at 16s, a Twitter profile interface showing a male user is visible; at 18s, an Instagram profile interface showing a male user appears; at 19s, a composite image shows social media profiles alongside a portrait.
